description: Implement heap sort algorithm in Go
steps: Create heap sort function that takes a slice of integers and returns sorted slice
Implement heapify function to build max heap
Implement sift down function for heap maintenance
Add handling for empty and single-element slices

description: Write unit tests for heap sort implementation
steps: Add test for single element slice
Add test for already sorted slice
Add test for reverse sorted slice
Add test for slice with duplicate elements

description: Add CLI interface for heap sort
steps: Accept input from command line arguments or stdin
Handle invalid input gracefully with error messages

description: Add performance benchmark for heap sort
steps: Implement benchmark tests with varying input sizes
Test with random, sorted, and reverse sorted inputs
